pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release property to 21 to target Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or meet the target JDK requirement.

quarkus-services/cxf-service/.mvn/wrappe.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Remove unused import for java.nio.file.Paths after refactoring to Path.of().
